hero_subtitle: SFTY Business delivers a unified compliance operating layer that strengthens audit trails, enhances risk visibility, and supports clear oversight for regulated digital asset executives.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Defensibility weakens across disconnected audit trails
problem_description: Executives at digital asset businesses struggle to provide clear audit evidence when compliance decisions and case histories remain scattered across separate tools. This lack of a unified compliance record complicates audit readiness and raises operational risks during reviews and due diligence.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates compliance decisions, case histories, and evidence across providers into a single operational layer so executives can access clear, traceable audit records supporting defensible compliance oversight.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to defensible evidence
workflow_description: SFTY organizes provider checks into structured reviews, case decisions, evidence preservation and audit-ready reports to support compliance defensibility.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. Clear audit control
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides executives with a provider-neutral compliance layer that connects workflows, decisions, evidence and reporting to support defensible audit readiness.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY enables VASP leadership to maintain defensible compliance decisions with connected provider orchestration, audit-ready evidence and governed deployment for risk and review control.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for digital asset executives?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides executives with a connected compliance view that reduces operational risk, strengthens auditability and supports bank due diligence across multi-jurisdictional digital asset operations.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY structure compliance workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY connects provider outputs into controlled workflows, routing alerts, creating cases, capturing decisions and linking regulatory changes to operational responses for clearer compliance governance.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY maintains evidence history, decision logs and case records to support audit-ready, defensible documentation of compliance actions and regulatory decision making.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing provider tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY is designed to integrate with existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers without disrupting current compliance stacks.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace our current compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers; it overlays them to structure outputs into one scalable, auditable compliance operating layer.
final_title: Turn compliance decisions into audit-ready records
final_description: Review how SFTY supports defensible compliance decisions, audit trails and risk visibility for digital asset executive oversight.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
